channel.title: Posts on 杨森 - Yang Sen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on 杨森 - Yang Sen

item.title: First post! Why this website?
item.description: So, finally a website! In the beginning I want share the reasons why I started this kind of blog. As I mentioned in the introduction, I intendet to to write here about some things that are on my mind and I read about, so that I can reflect on them and deepening the understanding. I think it helps alot to get your mind straight by writing a text about it. I was never a good auther or writer, but in my opinion this doesn’t matter.
